Off Calendar May-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS CAPITAL INDEMINITY CORPORATION'S ("Capitol Indemnity," incorrectly sued herein as DARWIN PROFESSIONAL UNDERWRITERS, INC., CAPITOL SPECIALTY INSURANCE CORPORATION, and PLATTE RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY) Motion For Order Granting Application Of Gene Comey To Appear Pro Hac Vice was denied without prejudice. No proof of payment of California Bar fees was provided at the hearing as required by the tentative ruling. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
